mapper.select: SELECT USER_NO as userNo, USER_NM as userNm, USER_EML_ADDR as userEmlAddr, USER_MNGR_YN as userMngrYn FROM ss_user WHERE USER_EML_ADDR = #{email}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM as rnum, T1.* FROM ( SELECT NTC_NO, NTC_TTL, NTC_CN, NTC_REG, NTC_REG_HM, NTC_MOD, NTC_MOD_HM, REG_NO, MOD_NO, USER_NM as "userVO.userNm", USER_MNGR_YN as "userVO.userMngrYn" FROM NOTICE LEFT JOIN SS_USER ON NOTICE.REG_NO = SS_USER.USER_NO WHERE 1 = 1
AND NTC_TTL LIKE '%' || #{searchWord} || '%'
AND NTC_CN LIKE '%' || #{searchWord} || '%'
ORDER BY CASE WHEN NTC_TTL LIKE '%[긴급]%' THEN 0 WHEN NTC_TTL LIKE '%[중요]%' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END ASC,
NTC_NO DESC ) T1 WHERE ROWNUM <= #{pageSize} * (#{pageNo} - 1) + #{pageSize} ) WHERE rnum >= #{pageSize} * (#{pageNo} - 1) + 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notice (NTC_NO, NTC_TTL, NTC_CN, NTC_REG, NTC_REG_HM, NTC_MOD, NTC_MOD_HM, REG_NO, MOD_NO) VALUES (SEQ_NTC_NO.NEXTVAL, #{ntcTtl}, #{ntcCn}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'HH24MI'), TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'HH24MI'), #{regNo}, #{modNo})
mapper.select: SELECT NTC_NO, NTC_TTL, NTC_CN, NTC_REG, NTC_REG_HM, NTC_MOD, NTC_MOD_HM, REG_NO, MOD_NO, LAG(NTC_NO) OVER (ORDER BY NTC_NO), LAG(NTC_TTL) over (ORDER BY NTC_NO), LEAD(NTC_NO) over (ORDER BY NTC_NO), LEAD(NTC_TTL) over (ORDER BY NTC_NO) FROM NOTICE WHERE NTC_NO = #{ntcNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE NOTICE SET NTC_TTL = #{ntcTtl}, NTC_CN = #{ntcCn}, NTC_MOD = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), NTC_MOD_HM = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'HH24MI'), MOD_NO = #{modNo} WHERE NTC_NO = #{ntcNo}
